overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through Night City. The player character moves from a plaza featuring the FF 06:B5 mech statue, across wet streets with pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas, past the Night City building with holographic advertisements, and encounters a large combat mech beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with mech statue and towering mega-skyscrapers

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal towering mega-buildings against the hazy night sky
camera descends and begins walking forward through the rain-soaked plaza

agents.ego_description: standing before the FF 06:B5 mech statue, looking up at the skyline, then walking forward through the plaza

entered.detail: large dark mech statue with illuminated FF 06:B5 text on the base
towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the haze
tall palm trees lining the plaza against the building backdrop
rain-soaked reflective tile pavement showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at ground level before a large mech statue in a wide plaza. The camera pans up to reveal massive skyscrapers disappearing into the hazy rain, then descends to walk forward across the wet reflective tiles. Sparse pedestrians are visible in the distance, and the scene is dominated by the scale of the surrounding mega-structures.

events.description: approaching the crosswalk with glowing yellow striped markings
crossing the wide street alongside pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking across a wide intersection surrounded by pedestrians with colorful glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing purple umbrella walking alongside the camera
person with bright green glowing umbrella crossing the street

entered.detail: modern glass building with illuminated cyan NIGHT CITY signage
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings with neon reflections
tall vertical digital advertising screen showing colorful content

segments.scene_description: Moving from the plaza into a wide urban intersection, the camera approaches and crosses a brightly marked crosswalk. The Night City building becomes visible ahead while pedestrians with neon umbrellas surround the camera. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights, and sparse vehicle traffic is visible on the roads.

events.description: stepping onto the sidewalk in front of the Night City building entrance
turning slightly right to follow the sidewalk past digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past the Night City building entrance, observing holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: person with bright green glowing umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: floating holographic advertisements including a large blue humanoid figure
futuristic purple-lit vending kiosks along the sidewalk
tall digital advertising pillars displaying product promotions

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the commercial sidewalk in front of the Night City building, passing vending machines and tall digital billboards. Holographic advertisements float in the air ahead, and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk in opposing directions. The wet concrete reflects the neon signage from the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with digital signage

events.description: moving under the elevated highway structure, ambient light decreases significantly
continuing straight along the sidewalk passing tall digital kiosks

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway structure where the environment becomes darker and more enclosed

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning above the street with support columns
tall illuminated advertising kiosks with pink and purple graphics
thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a semi-covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed under the overpass, with massive concrete support columns lining the path. Digital kiosks display bright advertisements, and moderate vehicle traffic is visible on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk under overpass with combat mech

events.description: large combat mech with glowing red lights comes into view on the sidewalk ahead
passing the stationary combat mech on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a large armed combat mech standing stationary on the sidewalk under the overpass

notable_agents.action: large combat mech with glowing red lights and heavy weaponry standing stationary on the sidewalk

entered.detail: confined walkway space under the overpass with wet reflective concrete
massive structural columns creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow, enclosed sidewalk completely under the elevated highway. The camera approaches and passes a large combat mech with glowing red lights standing on the right side of the path. The environment is darker and more confined, with the overpass structure creating a tunnel-like atmosphere and moderate traffic visible on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cavernous, imposing plaza into the vibrant, neon-drenched density of a commercial city center. It begins at the base of a massive mech statue, panning upward toward skyscrapers lost in a hazy rain before descending to move across wet, reflective tiles. As the camera leaves the open plaza, it enters a wide urban intersection, crossing a brightly marked crosswalk amidst a crowd of pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas. The scene then shifts toward the sidewalk of the Night City building, passing vending machines and tall digital billboards as the environment becomes saturated with floating holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera glides along the wet concrete, where the surrounding building facades cast vivid neon reflections across the rainy street.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a semi-covered sidewalk into a dark, confined corridor beneath an elevated highway. It begins by moving under the overpass where massive concrete support columns line the path and bright digital kiosks contrast with the deepening shadows. As the camera progresses, the environment shifts into a narrow, enclosed sidewalk that creates a tunnel-like atmosphere. The scene then tightens as the camera approaches and passes a large combat mech with glowing red lights standing on the right side of the path. Finally, the movement continues through this oppressive urban space with moderate vehicle traffic flowing on the adjacent road.
